svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="DZ1nFOSVpe48zMk12XyB" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-409" dy="-108" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="360" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：初始化的尺度决定逐层方差是爆炸、消失还是稳定" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="720" x="20" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yaxis" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=1.2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="90" y="270" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="64" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xaxis" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=1.2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="90" y="270" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="270" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ylbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;horizontal=0;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#888888;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="激活 / 梯度方差" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="20" x="56" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#888888;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="网络深度（层）→" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="160" x="200" y="274" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="explode" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="190" y="150" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="112" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="86" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="100" y="178" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="425" y="74" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vanish" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="190" y="210" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="232" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="246" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="100" y="178" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="425" y="252" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stable" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#2e8b57;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="260" y="167" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="100" y="168" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="425" y="166" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lexp" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="太大 → 方差逐层爆炸" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="432" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lsta" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#2e8b57;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="合适(Kaiming) → 方差稳定" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="170" x="432" y="158" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lvan" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="太小 → 方差逐层消失" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="432" y="244" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fbox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e7f2e4;strokeColor=#2e8b57;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;" value="Kaiming/He 初始化：
W ~ U(−√k, √k), k = 1 / fan_in
BN 起步：γ = 1, β = 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="150" x="600" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="训练开始前的权重数值很关键：太大会让前向方差逐层放大、反向梯度爆炸；太小会让信号逐层衰减、梯度消失。Kaiming/He 初始化按 fan_in 缩放权重，使各层激活方差大致守恒；配合 BN（γ=1, β=0 起步）更稳。PyTorch 对 Conv/Linear 默认即采用此类初始化。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="720" x="20" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 图：初始化的尺度决定逐层方差是爆炸、消失还是稳定

div.div: 太大 → 方差逐层爆炸

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(231, 242, 228), rgb(26, 35, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 139, 87), rgb(78, 158, 114));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 225px; margin-left: 602px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Kaiming/He 初始化：
W ~ U(−√k, √k), k = 1 / fan_in
BN 起步：γ = 1, β = 0

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 322px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 训练开始前的权重数值很关键：太大会让前向方差逐层放大、反向梯度爆炸；太小会让信号逐层衰减、梯度消失。Kaiming/He 初始化按 fan_in 缩放权重，使各层激活方差大致守恒；配合 BN（γ=1, β=0 起步）更稳。PyTorch 对 Conv/Linear 默认即采用此类初始化。
